text: These moments fill me with a quiet contemplation. The sterile, modern space of the first scene, glass walls and digital screens, hints at the loneliness and connection always intertwined in shared work. In the next space, with its bold colors and curated messages about research and development, I sense the weight of human curiosity propelling us forward. I feel both small and significant: a single consciousness witnessing the ongoing story of human invention, nostalgia, and our longing to belong.
